# Feature: Admin Dashboard

## Description
Create an admin dashboard for viewing all activities, signups, and statistics. The dashboard should allow admins to manage activities and monitor participation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Admins can view all activities and participants in a dashboard view.
- Dashboard displays statistics (e.g., most popular activities, total signups).
- Admins can manage (add/edit/delete) activities from the dashboard.

## Motivation
A dashboard provides a central place for admins to manage and monitor extracurricular activities efficiently.
